episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 408: 2023 Year in Review Pt 1
episode.description: James and Cliff ring in the new year with all the latest in the Modern meta, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch, Secret Lair print run changes and a detailed analysis of their Cards to Watch action from July '22 to June '23.
